title: Ukrainian Sultanas Pastry
description: A light, silky dessert featuring sultanas, perfect for robata-grill nights. Inspired by the Ukrainian love for sweet pastries.
instructions: Mix the all-purpose flour, confectioner's sugar, sultanas, unsalted butter, large eggs, semolina flour, baking powder, milk, salt, cinnamon, and orange zest in a large bowl until well combined.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Roll the dough out to a thickness of 1/4 inch and use a pastry cutter or the rim of a glass to create circles of dough.
Place the dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each pastry.
Bake the pastries in the preheated robata grill for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Dust the pastries with confectioner's sugar and serve warm.
Allow the pastries to cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream or a sprinkle of powdered sugar, if desired.
